content.speakerText: I'm new here and would really appreciate your contact details. Could I get your business card?
content.speakerTextCn: 我是新来的，非常希望获得您的联系方式。我能拿一张您的名片吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! Here you go — and here's mine too.
Happy to! Let me find one for you.
Sure! I don't have a physical card right now, but I can send you my LinkedIn profile.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应请求，提供名片或合理替代方案
语言准确性：使用了恰当的礼貌结构（Could I..., I'd appreciate...）和动词搭配
表达自然度：语气真诚、专业，符合新员工与同事初次接触的语境

content.scenarioHint: 在商务会议结束后，你希望与一位新认识的合作伙伴交换名片，以便后续联系。
content.speakerText: Would it be possible to exchange business cards?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们是否可以交换一下名片？
expectedAnswers: Absolutely, happy to share mine as well.
Sure! Let me hand you mine and get yours.
Certainly! I've got one right here.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了交换名片的请求
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合英语母语者日常表达习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'business cards' 或 'exchange' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 在行业展会中，你与一位潜在客户交谈愉快，希望留下联系方式以便后续跟进。
content.speakerText: I'd really appreciate it if we could swap business cards.
content.speakerTextCn: 如果我们能交换一下名片，我会非常感激。
expectedAnswers: Of course! Here you go — and here's mine.
Sure thing! Let me grab one from my wallet.
Absolutely! I’ve got one right here.
Happy to! I’ll give you mine if you give me yours.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了交换名片的意愿
语言准确性：使用了恰当的礼貌表达如 'I'd appreciate it'，语法无误
表达自然度：符合英语口语中自然、友好的交流方式
关键词覆盖：使用了 'swap' 或 'exchange' 和 'business cards' 等核心词汇
